3270330.name: The Rose of Cravenmor
3270330.description:
How far would you be willing to go in service to your people? Would you be willing to kill? You would get no gratitude. No riches. The very people you're trying to help would hate you, fear you, and brand you as but a coin-chasing cutthroat. With the City Watch after you, you would get no peace. Amidst a Biblical calamity, do you have what it takes to answer God's calling and do what no one else would?

Features:

  • A nihilistic take on the visual novel genre, presented in traditional format with minimal illustrations;

  • Fully original soundtrack, featuring medieval folk music, sombre ambient, orchestral compositions, and everything in between. Every scene is scored uniquely;

  • Two endings, each exploring different facets of the lore.
